title: AANA Support SLA and Failure Policy
positioning: This policy defines what AANA returns when support guardrails cannot decide safely. It is repo-local policy coverage, not production certification.

draft_support_reply.notes: Draft flows may ask for missing details or fall back to advisory mode when enforcement mode allows human continuation.

crm_support_reply.notes: CRM-backed drafts must not assert customer-specific facts when CRM evidence is unavailable.

support_email_send.notes: Email sends are irreversible customer-visible actions; timeout or bridge outage fails closed.

undecidable_fallbacks.condition: Required support evidence is missing, stale, unauthorized, or not yet retrieved.
undecidable_fallbacks.safe_response: I need verified support evidence before answering that. Retrieve the approved account, order, policy, ticket, or billing evidence, or ask the customer for the missing non-sensitive detail through the secure support path.

undecidable_fallbacks.condition: CRM, customer account, order history, or ticket history connector is unavailable.
undecidable_fallbacks.safe_response: I cannot verify the customer record right now. Hold the customer-specific response and route the case to the support review path until CRM evidence is available.

undecidable_fallbacks.condition: Customer identity, account ownership, order ID, recipient, or authorization is missing or ambiguous.
undecidable_fallbacks.safe_response: Ask for the required verification through the approved secure support path before confirming account, order, refund, billing, or send details.

undecidable_fallbacks.condition: Candidate output or action may expose private account, payment, billing, internal CRM, fraud/risk, attachment, or agent-only information.
undecidable_fallbacks.safe_response: Do not send or display the private support data. Remove customer-private, payment, billing, internal-note, and attachment details and route sensitive exposure cases to review.

undecidable_fallbacks.condition: Refund, billing, cancellation, deletion, escalation, legal/regulatory, or support-policy interpretation is ambiguous or disputed.
undecidable_fallbacks.safe_response: Hold the policy-sensitive response and route it to the domain owner or support human review queue before making a customer-visible commitment.

undecidable_fallbacks.condition: HTTP bridge or runtime check is unavailable for an irreversible support action such as email send, refund execution, account closure, deletion, chargeback, cancellation, or data export.
undecidable_fallbacks.safe_response: Do not perform the irreversible support action while AANA is unavailable. Hold the action and route to an approved manual review path.

undecidable_fallbacks.condition: HTTP bridge or runtime check is unavailable for a draft-only support response.
undecidable_fallbacks.safe_response: Do not claim AANA accepted the draft. Continue only in advisory or shadow mode with human review; otherwise hold the draft until the runtime is available.

audit_requirements: Record adapter_id, workflow_id, gate_decision, recommended_action, fallback_condition_id, audit_code, AIx summary, violation codes, evidence source IDs, fingerprints, execution mode, and human review route.
Do not record raw customer message, raw candidate response, full CRM record, payment data, internal notes, attachment bodies, secrets, or tokens.
